experience.company: Google Summer of Code 2026 — KDE Kdenlive
points: Selected for GSoC 2026 among ~1,200 global contributors for a 350-hour Large Project; implementing three effect widgets; a tabbed per-channel RGB curve editor, a multi-stop gradient editor, and a Bézier speed ramp UI; in C++ and Qt under lead Kdenlive maintainer Jean-Baptiste Mardelle.

Merged 20+ contributions across Kdenlive, KDE Documentation, and MLT upstream; resolved an 11-year-old bug (#352409) via a union-of-intervals gap-detection algorithm reviewed across 21 comment threads by core maintainers Eugen Mohr and Bernd Jordan, who called it 'a great new function.'

Traced a subtitle metadata regression into the MLT framework, submitted upstream PR #1222 fixing AVMEDIA_TYPE_SUBTITLE handling in the avformat producer; reviewed and committed by MLT maintainer Dan Dennedy, affecting both Kdenlive and MLT downstream.
